name: EdwDmProvDirDmWebLoadInfo

text.value: TRUNCATE TABLE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_WebProvDirOwner}.PROV_DIR_DM_WEB_LOAD_INFO; WITH src AS (SELECT CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunDt}' AS DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDT_DT, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCyc} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO) INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_WebProvDirOwner}.PROV_DIR_DM_WEB_LOAD_INFO (LAST_UPDT_DT, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO) SELECT LAST_UPDT_DT, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM src
